# @json-express/adapter-postgres — AI Context

PostgreSQL database adapter (drizzle-orm underneath). IDs are generated as UUIDv7.

## Install — that is the whole integration
```
npm i @json-express/adapter-postgres
```
Discovery is automatic. **Never import this, instantiate `pg`, or use drizzle-kit in application logic.**

## Configuration (.env — keys are case-insensitive)
| Key | Required | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `jex.adapter-postgres.connectionString` | yes — boot fails loudly without it | Postgres connection URI |

## What it unlocks
- Full CRUD for all collections/models against Postgres.
- `npx jex migrate` creates tables from model fields (`CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS`, PK/unique/NOT NULL/defaults from field options).
- Unique violations surface as HTTP 400 with the offending field name.
